utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes entries for all 6 sections. Next, check if each is fully specified with details: 1) property: includes address, price, bedrooms, school district, viewing reference, viewing date — fully specified. 2) financing: includes lender, loan amount, application reference, equity contribution, processing time, status — terms like interest rate/tenor are not explicitly stated, but 'financing solution with terms' could be interpreted as needing rate/term; however, it still provides concrete lender, amounts, timeline, and status, which may suffice as 'terms' are partially provided. 3) legal_services: firm, service, cost, reference, consultation date — fully specified. 4) moving_services: company, service, cost, reference, timing — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utilities with service, cost, reference, includes; property_survey service, cost, reference; home_warranty service, cost, coverage — fully specified. 6) total_budget: detailed cost breakdown with line items and totals — fully specified. All 6 items are present and reasonably complete.
